item.title: Protest against corruption in Serbia
item.description:
800 000 persons
Protest in front of the Serbian Parliament
After filling up the square in front of the Serbian parliament, protesters have now filled up the Slavija square also
protest against corruption in the history of Serbia
Lot of people
Things are moving
Bucharest standing firm for a pro-european trajectory
Pro European Demonstrations in Rome
Massive Anti-Government protest in Hungary too
Pro European Demonstrations in Romania
The Greater European Union Is this on the way ? ( with Canada and Greenland )

item.title: Sunday's Dumpy
item.description:
2 :: Cartoon Bomb
Mission failed successfully
4 :: She knows what she's doing
The endless elevator at Prague City Hall.
6 :: A useful mom hack!!
This machine carving a wooden ball
8 :: Filling bags of flour
I'm never mowing again...
10 :: Laser varnish removal
Fringe edge
12 :: May be useful
Painting
14 :: smart
3 months of drawing in 36 seconds
16 :: The perfect breakfast does exist
18 :: Motorbike climbing
Lawn Mower in action
20 :: Use wood, not plastic
item.dc:creator: TerribleBot

item.title: Body painted myself as Silk - MCroft07
item.description:
Silk is my favourite spider!!!! When I saw silk I fell in love with her and went to read her stories! I really liked her because I just felt like I could be her since she looked like me!!! Faq I use body paint and do these in a mirror No, it is not AI I don’t recreate the reference photo like for like so I’ve put in a photo, but I prefer to change parts of the design to make it more “my version”. Yes, I have read comic books in my life. No, I will not list every comic book ever existed to prove it I use professional body paint covers (pasties) this means I am not wearing a top but I am also not naked. I paint myself, I make the props myself, I film myself, and I also edit. This is my full time thing now (yayy) I paint these by looking in a mirror, with brushes, and paint It takes between 6-12 hours each Body painting myself is my hobby/passion I do own clothes It doesn’t tickle “Why don’t you just wear clothes” once again, body painting myself is my hobby/passion. I am painting my skin, I am not wearing a suit - but that does not mean I am naked. I know, even I think this is a ridiculous set of questions I have to constantly answer I did not go to art school, I am self taught. Talent gets you so far, but this is a learned skill. The paint isn’t edible (gross) I've been painting myself for 16 years. The 07 does not mean I was born in 2007, UK 7 is my shoe size No, I don't need help painting my back, I don't want to paint my back, I don't need to paint my back. (also gross) No, I don't need help washing it off. (also you are gross) If you want to see more I am MCroft07 on IG, twitter, Tiktok, YouTube I paint them live on twitch I like doing the lip syncs, they're fun for me while I paint them. I couldn’t care less if you think they’re cringe. I am cringe but I am free My tattoos on my ribs are from Tomb Raider - I am a big TR fan I do not have an OF but if you want to send me money THAT badly you can just tip my twitch account. Haha. The shower afterwards takes about 15 minutes, I use a regular sponge and shower gel. The reason why it can look different at the end is because I am wearing a wig, I promise you it is not a different person because the hair changed. While on this topic, if my eyes change colour it’s because I am wearing contact lenses. (Those with an IQ above 10… I know. Even I’m shocked the wig thing is a frequent comment). I use body paint. It doesn’t tickle, I am very ticklish and this is fine. I don’t have an allergic reaction to the paint, but if you do it, you should always do a patch test first I do not know where you can buy body paint in every country. I know in the UK it is available at FacePaintingshop.com. I use a plethora of different brands, it’s best to search for them yourself online. I don’t work in Hollywood, I don’t want to. I just want to improve my body painting for myself. I am English, not American. I do not go outside like this to scare people. 1, that would be very cold. 2, in this current age, everyone would take photos without me knowing and it would likely dox me :)))))) I’m not a sweaty person, but if I was this would be a lot more difficult. Thank you to those of you who came from Imgur to my Twitch channel! “What’s the point in painting yourself when you can wear clothes?” all my clothes are in the laundry, had to resort to this, tough life It would not be quicker to jump into a pool of paint - think of the drying time?! If you're still here I’m about to get a biscoff chocolate I don’t care that I wash it off at the end, I get to reuse this canvas, we love a reduce, reuse, recycle queen. I am not the lady who did the Maneskin video, it’s a cool video and she slayed, but it isn’t me. I can promise you there is not *a man* painting these and I am pretending to paint myself. I am genuinely painting myself. I know a lot of you don’t like reading this faq because it is horrid to see that I have to answer all of these. Unfortunately I have noticed that when I don’t put in all the icky things then I get more gross comments and I just have to spend more time blocking people so it’s better to call it out. I just copy and paste it each time anyway.
Reference, she looks like this
item.dc:creator: MCroft07

item.title: What Happened Today #44
item.description: * Defying judges. * Militarizing borders. * Shrugging off economic chaos. Trump’s latest power moves: migrants deported despite court orders, a warship headed to the border, and a $5T market plunge dismissed as “healthy.” Now, he’s testing whether he can void Biden’s pardons, backing away from war crimes probes, and prepping new tariffs. Resistance is slow to rise, but over 1,000 in Boston took to the streets against layoffs and overreach. Will more follow? ⚡ Stay informed. Stay engaged. ? Subscribe free → govbrief.today ? Share this. Post it. Keep the spotlight on. #GovBriefToday #Resist2025 1. https://www.axios.com/2025/03/16/trump-white-house-defy-judge-deport-venezuelans 2. https://maritime-executive.com/article/destroyer-uss-gravely-deploys-to-the-southern-border 3. https://www.browndailyherald.com/article/2025/03/brown-professor-doctor-deported-despite-federal-judges-orders 4. https://www.nytimes.com/2025/03/17/us/politics/trump-ukraine-invasion-accountability.html 5. https://www.bbc.com/news/live/c3e4xzd8qq8t 6. https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/trump-administration/treasury-scott-bessent-not-worried-stock-market-selloff-rcna196608 7. https://www.newsweek.com/donald-trump-joe-biden-jan-6-pardons-void-vacant-2045724 8. https://www.reuters.com/world/us/trump-says-no-exemptions-steel-aluminum-tariffs-2025-03-17/ 9. https://www.bostonglobe.com/2025/03/15/metro/trump-musk-protest-rally-boston-common-pride-in-democracy/
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos

item.title: Orange Juice Futures Crashing since Trump Took Office
item.description: Thing I just noticed... Orange Juice futures (OJ=F) are down 46% since Trump took office. Showing the last 5 yrs, there's a dramatic decline once Trump started. Just kind of funny. https://finance.yahoo.com/chart/OJ%3DF

Like what we do and how we do it? Leave a tip. Or don't. It's totally cool either way. Stay True & Stay Tuned - Meta Pathos

item.title: Feel like a failure
item.description:
After doing 7mins CPR to keep Mom alive, her spending almost 2 months in the hospital, then a physical rehab facility, now home, hospital bed, oxygen machine, her co-pays on everything have been exorbitant.
I'm trying so very hard to take care of her, but I feel like it's an endless fight just to keep myself going
I am so incredibly thankful to the pizza angels last week, first time my stomach's been full in a couple weeks.
I take 3 separate medications for my heart, 2 hypertensions and a thinner .. and I've been off of all 3 of them for over a week, haven't been able to afford to get them filled. We could really use some help if anybody's able.. I am mortified of being a burden, but I really just can't anymore
Broken thumb tax. Gust of wind getting out of the car yesterday at just the perfect moment to slam the door on my thumb. Had to twist and contort to get my other hand over to open the door.. then immediately pulled my thumb straight I know asking is pretty much useless, everybody is struggling and fighting, and this will die in usersub, but even if only for her, I have to ask.. Edit;- The appreciate link on the bottom right goes to a ko-fi- ko-fi.com/BoobJiggle https://www.paypal.com/pool/9davYV9mR2 I am terrified, absolutely mortified, of being a burden on anybody .. please don't put yourself out or make your own situation any harder
item.dc:creator: BoobJiggle

item.title: How to reclaim your wheelchair from a disservice animal
item.dc:creator: tampacl

item.title: Love knows no language barrier
item.description: Many years ago when I was in school (about 20-25 years back) I knew a guy who shared a story about a deaf girl he was dating. He saw her using sign language at a cafe or similar location, and in an effort to be friendly sat down across from her and signed "hello" to her. She got super excited at encountering someone else who spoke sign language and started rapidly talking at him with it. He had to stop her and explain by writing on napkins that he only knew a few words of sign language. She was embarrassed, but they managed to have a nice conversation in writing. The stayed in touch and started dating and I think he started learning more sign language so they didn't need to communicate via written notes. One of the stories that stood out the most to me was how he would talk to over the phone. Apparently back then there was a phone service of some kind that allowed people to call a deaf person and a third party operator would transcribe any spoken message to text or something the deaf person's phone could display. The operator would also read the deaf person's reply to the person on the other end. (This was back before texting was as easy as it is now. Many services at the time still charged you a few cents per text, and many cell phones at the time had keypads that were hard to write long messages on.) Well, one time he was talking to her on the phone like this and the operator (female) switched out with a male operator for a break during the conversation without saying anything. So this guy was used to hearing his girlfriend's messages read to him in a female voice. Then suddenly he hears he message read to him in a dude's voice and was taken-aback by both the unexpected change and hearing certain things being said to him by a guy. But everyone was able to laugh after the confusion was cleared up. That story just stood out as one of the more interesting stories of a couple dating.
item.dc:creator: Othagovna

item.title: Now that’s art
item.description: Tesla Model 3 crushed by an Olmec statue, By Mexican sculptor Chavis Marmol
item.dc:creator: ssumner13

item.title: Thank you, Carl....
item.description: I was in Ithaca today while my nephew replaced the screen on my wife's laptop. While I was there I did something I've wanted to do for years and paid my respects at Carl Sagan's grave. My love of science and astronomy is a direct result of watching Cosmos with my father when it was first broadcast on PBS.

item.dc:creator: bohund

item.title: It's a feature
item.description: Edit for those not getting it. : This is a reference to the Fallout games made by Bathesda games and the TV show inspired by them. The game publisher is famous for releasing fun games that are just riddled with glitches. To the point where users will mod and patch games to make playable. So comment is saying TV show needed glitches to be true to the games. Which is a rather painfully accurate. Also, you don't need to have played the games to enjoy the show. Highly recommend.
item.dc:creator: EnduserisaJerk
